calendar.matters:
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Jun-07-2022 Off Calendar

Notice Of Hearing For Default Prove Up
Off Calendar May-17-2022 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This matter came on calendar this day for Prove-Up Hearing as to defaulted defendant Andrea Van Dell.
Dept. 514. Visiting Judge: Judith S. Craddick. Clerk: K. Dougherty. Proceedings recorded by "For the Record" commencing at 9:27 a.m.

Kurtis Jacobs, Esq. appeared for plaintiff JPMorgan Chase Bank, N.A.
Mariana Echeverria-Licona, Associate Vendor Management Analyst and Custodian of Records for plaintiff, was placed under oath and testified.
Both Mr. Jacobs and Ms. Echeverria-Licona appeared via ZOOM for this morning's hearing.
No appearance by defendant Andrea Van Dell.

Plaintiff's Complaint for Common Counts (Open Book and Account Stated) was filed on December 7, 2021, and personally served on defendant Lyndon K. Louie on December 9, 2021.
Default as to defendant Andrea Van Dell was entered on January 1, 2022.
No DOE defendants were named in plaintiff's complaint.

Plaintiff JPMorgan Chase Bank, N.A. submits the following exhibit for the Court's review:
Exhibit A: JPMorgan Chase Billing Statements to defendant Andrea Van Dell.............ID/EVID

After hearing the evidence presented, and good cause appearing, the Court rules in favor of Plaintiff JPMorgan Chase Bank, N.A., and against the defaulted defendant Andrea Van Dell, as follows:

Damages/Principal - $29,875.53.
Prejudgment Interest - Waived.
Attorney Fees - Waived.
Costs - Waived.

Total - $29,875.53.

Proposed Judgment was submitted to and signed by the Court.

Plaintiff STIPULATES to the return of the exhibit.

Proceedings concluded at 9:39 a.m.

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Apr-19-2022 Continued To Jun-29-22 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

Notice Of Hearing For Default Prove Up
Off Calendar Mar-29-2022 Continued To May-17-22 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 514
